overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing protagonist Aloy traversing a snowy mountain landscape. The character walks from an abandoned camp area through rocky terrain, passes beneath massive ancient circular ruins, and approaches a cliff edge overlooking a distant valley settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain path near abandoned camp

agents.ego_description: Aloy walking steadily through deep snow away from a wooden camp debris area

entered.detail: collapsed wooden structure with scattered logs and fabric remains
snow-dusted bushes with distinctive red-purple leaves
narrow trail through deep snow with visible footprints
tall evergreen trees with snow-laden branches
single vertical wooden pole with colored ribbons tied around it

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a snowy mountain path near an abandoned camp. Aloy walks away from wooden debris and red foliage bushes, heading toward distant rocky terrain. The environment is quiet and empty, with tall pine trees visible in the background under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail with ancient ruins approaching

events.description: terrain transitions from flat camp area to uneven rocky path with large ancient ruins becoming visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: Aloy walking across snow-covered rocky terrain toward massive ancient structures

entered.detail: massive dark stone ruins with geometric shapes looming in the distance
large boulders and rocky outcrops covered in snow and ice
uneven ground with exposed stone and patches of snow
steep rocky cliff face with snow accumulation

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to rocky mountain terrain as Aloy leaves the camp area behind. Ancient ruins become visible in the distance, and the path becomes uneven with snow-covered rocks. The wooden post and red bushes fade behind as the character approaches the massive structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain ridge path beneath massive circular ruins

events.description: path leads beneath massive circular ancient ruins arching overhead

agents.ego_description: Aloy walking along a narrow ridge path passing under the massive circular ruins

entered.detail: enormous curved metallic structure with icicles hanging from its edge, arching over the path
steep drop-off with snow-covered ledge overlooking valley below

segments.scene_description: Aloy traverses a narrow mountain ridge path passing beneath massive circular ancient ruins that arch overhead. The terrain becomes more precarious with a cliff edge on the right offering views of the valley below. The ruins dominate the skyline as the character moves through the semi-covered passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge overlook with valley settlement view

events.description: approaching wooden barriers at cliff edge with expansive view of valley settlement below

agents.ego_description: Aloy approaching the cliff edge overlook with wooden barriers, viewing the valley settlement

entered.detail: rough wooden log barriers and fencing along the cliff edge path
expansive view of misty valley with distant structures and mountains
distant buildings and camp structures visible in the valley below

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a cliff edge overlook protected by wooden fence barriers. The massive ruins arch fades behind as Aloy reaches the overlook point, revealing an expansive view of a misty valley with distant settlement structures below. The path narrows along the cliff edge with the valley sprawling into the hazy distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, abandoned mountain camp toward a sweeping cliffside overlook of a distant valley. It begins on a snowy path amidst wooden debris and red foliage, moving away from the camp's remnants toward a rugged, rocky terrain under an overcast sky. As the character advances, the environment shifts from pine-lined slopes to an uneven mountain ridge, where the path leads directly beneath massive, circular ancient ruins that arch overhead. The scene then opens up as the camera passes through these towering structures, following a precarious ledge that reveals the first glimpses of the valley below. Finally, the movement concludes at a wooden fence barrier on the cliff's edge, where the ruins fade into the background to reveal an expansive, misty vista of a sprawling settlement in the hazy distance.
